_comment: FLEET ROLLOUT GATE for the furnace/loop protection pair (Skill 60 ZHC Early Warning System + Skill 61 Loop Protection System). The activation wiring is LIVE in install.sh (onboarding) and update-skills.sh (updater), but it is HELD by default: client-box activation runs ONLY when this gate is enabled. This honors SKILL.md law 8 (PROVE ON THE OPERATOR BOX, THEN HOLD), the ratified 7-03 repo-only HOLD, and the batch-rollout doctrine (roll fleet-wide as ONE batch on the operator's word, never per-fix). The operator-box first-proof script (scripts/loop-protection-first-proof.sh --role operator) is UNGATED by design: it must prove FIRST. To roll: flip fleet_rollout_enabled to true in ONE commit (the batch rollout) on Trevor's explicit word; or set OPENCLAW_LOOP_PROTECTION_ROLLOUT=1 in the box env to override for a staged batch. Neither the gate nor the wiring EVER arms a box: install leaves DRY_RUN observe-only (armed=false); Tier-1 arming is the operator's separate, post-burn-in action.
held_reason: Awaiting the operator-box install + 7-day DRY_RUN burn-in per SKILL.md law 8 and the 7-03 ratified HOLD.
